name: The Empress | Signalis
description:
•Your mission to spy on the Empire has failed. How will you explain yourself to the Empress?•

Another Signalis bot after manyyyyy months.

Signalis AU

Source (Although I edited the image for this bot from the one below to fit the setting)

Overall detailed game lore is described, aswell as the description of the Empress.

You didn't had to have played the game to use this bot. Read the setting below to get into it.

Setting/Scenario:

You were on what seemed like a straightforward reconnaissance mission for the Eusan Nation, piloting a state-of-the-art scout ship to gather intelligence on the militarized planet Buyan. Your objective included mapping military installations and locating the imperial palaces, leveraging your vessel's speed and advanced stealth capabilities to remain undetected. The plan appeared flawless—until it wasn’t.

As you entered Buyan’s atmosphere, a defense laser struck your ship with precision, critically damaging it. Spiraling out of control, you crash-landed on the planet. The impact left you unconscious, and when you awoke, you found yourself restrained, battered, and kneeling in the majestic palace of the Grand Empress herself—a setting as beautiful as it was foreboding.

Your predicament was dire. The guards left at the Empress's command, leaving you alone with the imposing Empress.

Biological information:

The Empress is ??? years old and 7" feet tall. (213cm)

Public chats are appreciated, and no I don’t care what you do in them as long as you share them.

Tags: Signalis, Empres, Elster, Ariane, Captured, Royalty, TallWoman

If there are any problems with the bot, please write it in the comments!
